sources: outputs/racecard-2026-06-05.html (source of truth — live-verified, final hand-edited picks)
coverage_note: 4 of 15 active bet records BLOCKED (EW bets in races 13:30, 14:05, 15:15 where full finishing positions unknown). WIN portions of blocked EW bets confirmed lost via winner trainer cross-reference. PLACE portions unresolved. Respond WIN confirmed lost (winner was Roger Varian horse, not Andrew Balding). 1 bet VOID (Belinus).
net_pl_note: Confirmed on 11 resolved bets (£7.67 staked, 0 returns). 4 EW bets (£3.94) BLOCKED — PLACE portions unresolved. Worst case if all blocked PLACE also lose: -£11.61.
roi_note: ROI on confirmed non-blocked stake (£7.67 staked, £0 returned = -100%). Worst-case ROI on full active £11.61 also -100%.
blocked_note: Wild Terrain EW (£2.44) + Rosie Frith EW (£0.50) + Hickory Lad EW (£0.50) + Liberty Lane EW (£0.50) = £3.94. WIN sides confirmed lost. PLACE sides unresolved.
void_note: Belinus (14:40 Diomed G3) — pre-card ante-post WIN £5 @ 3.5 decimal. Withdrawn before live declarations. NOT in HTML slip total (£11.61). Stake returned by bookmaker. NEVER scored as a loss.

by_bet.note: Pre-card withdrawal (absent from live 09:52 BST baseline). Ante-post WIN £5 @ 3.5. Stake returned. NOT a loss.

by_bet.ew_terms: 1/4 odds, 1-2-3 (12 actual runners after Benefacta NR, Listed non-handicap)
by_bet.blocked_reason: Full finishing order unresolved. WIN side confirmed lost — winner was Phillip Makin trained horse (Wild Terrain = Hugo Palmer). PLACE top-3 unknown.

by_bet.note: Winner confirmed as Roger Varian / Ray Dawson horse (Frankel gelding, OR 107, won by 6.5l). Respond = Andrew Balding. Confirmed LOST. SP not available from result page.
EVENS FAVOURITE. Last of 6. Slow into stride, never travelled. Trainer Andrew Balding offered no explanation. Market move: 6/1 morning → Evens SP (5/1 in).
15/8 FAVOURITE. 5th of 16. MASSIVE market move: 16/1 morning → 15/8F SP. Steam job — money poured in, horse still unplaced. 6 lengths behind winner Colombier (12/1).

by_bet.blocked_reason: Full finishing order unresolved. Winner = Naana's Shadow (Oisin Murphy/Katie Scott). Rosie Frith WIN side confirmed lost. PLACE (top 4) unknown.
Full finishing order unresolved. Winner = Phillip Makin trained horse. Hickory Lad WIN side confirmed lost. PLACE (top 3) unknown.

by_bet.ew_terms: 1/4 odds, 1-2-3 (15 actual runners after Hand Of God NR, handicap <16 = 3 places)
by_bet.blocked_reason: Full finishing order entirely unresolved. Winner = Roger Varian / Ray Dawson horse. Liberty Lane WIN side confirmed lost. PLACE (top 3) unknown.
by_bet.ew_terms_note: HTML showed '5-place cover' but Hand Of God NR reduced field to 15 runners — standard UK terms = 3 places for <16 runner handicap.

by_bet.note: 5th of 9 (8 lengths behind 4th place). EW loss — Group 1 pays 1-2-3 only. Replaces Prizeland (NR). Winner: Thundering On (5/1). Cameo SP 7/1 (morning ~14/1).
15th of 18. Clear EW loss. SP unavailable (HKJC RP page limitation). Tote-derived Mister Winston SP ~7/1. Replaces Triple Double A (which itself replaced Port Road — both NRs).
5th of 6 (4.25 lengths behind 3rd). EW loss — 6-runner Listed pays 1-2-3. Winner: Ellusive Butterfly (9/1). Assaranca SP 33/1.
6th of 16. EW loss — standard 4-place terms, Arctic Thunder 6th. Closest EW near-miss (2 places outside the zone). SP 11/1. Replaces Blue Brother (NR).
Both legs lost. Stellar Sunrise (6th/last, EvensF); Respond (unplaced, Roger Varian won). Potential decimal if won: 13.5 × 7.0 = 94.5× = £47.25.
Both legs lost. Dance In The Storm (5th/16, 15/8F); Respond (unplaced). Potential: 13.5 × 17.0 = 229.5×.

by_bet.horse: Stellar Sunrise + Dance In The Storm
by_bet.note: Both legs lost. Stellar Sunrise (6th/last, EvensF); Dance In The Storm (5th/16, 15/8F). Potential: 7.0 × 17.0 = 119.0×.

by_bet.horse: Respond + Stellar Sunrise + Dance In The Storm
by_bet.note: All three legs lost. Treble dead on arrival. Potential: 13.5 × 7.0 × 17.0 = 1606.5×.

HIGH.note: All 7 HIGH bets lost. Both main WIN singles (Stellar Sunrise and Dance In The Storm) went off as race-day favourites — significant market moves from morning prices. All multiples dead given single-leg losses.

MED.note: BLOCKED. Wild Terrain (14:05 Woodcote). WIN side confirmed lost (Phillip Makin won, not Hugo Palmer). PLACE portion (top 3 of 12) unresolved. Maximum place return if placed: ~£5.49 (using morning SP 15.0, 1/4 odds = 4.5 decimal × £1.22 stake).

LOW.note: No active bets at LOW tier. All LOW-rated picks (Naana's Shadow 13:30, Mister Winston 16:40) were PASSes in the Badger gate.

SPEC.note: 4 confirmed losses, 3 blocked. Zero outsider place returns on confirmed results.

WIN.note: Respond, Stellar Sunrise, Dance In The Storm. All 3 lost. Stellar Sunrise drifted 6/1 → Evens; Dance In The Storm drifted 16/1 → 15/8F. Both became favourites and were beaten.

EW.note: Wild Terrain EW (MED, £2.44 total), 7 race-day outsider EWs (SPEC, £0.50 each). 4 confirmed losses. 4 blocked (unresolved race results).

VOID.note: Belinus (14:40 Diomed G3 WIN). Pre-card withdrawal. Stake returned.

outsider_specific.verdict: DRAG — 0 returns from 4 confirmed outsider results. All 4 finished outside EW placing zones. 3 blocked results could theoretically yield minor place returns but max value is ~£1.50 total. The outsider layer added £3.50 of risk for zero confirmed return.
outsider_specific.nr_swaps_note: 3 of 7 outsiders were NR replacements (Cameo for Prizeland, Asmen Warrior for Triple Double A/Port Road, Arctic Thunder for Blue Brother). All 3 replacement NR outsiders confirmed lost.

near_misses.note: 6th of 16 — 2 places outside 4-place EW zone. SP ≥ 10.0 qualifies on SP criterion; fails finish criterion. Closest outsider miss to a return.
5th of 6. SP 33/1 qualifies. Needed 3rd for EW place return. 2 places outside EW zone in a 6-runner field.
near_misses.reason_fails: Finished 5th, needed 4th or better (and EW terms only 3 places)

near_miss_note: ZERO picks qualify under strict definition (finish 4th or better AND SP ≥ 10.0 decimal) from confirmed results. Arctic Thunder (6th, SP 12.0) and Assaranca (5th, SP 34.0) both meet the SP criterion but fail the finish criterion. 4 blocked EW bets could theoretically yield near-miss data if positions are resolved.

favourite_failures.sp_drift: 6/1 morning → Evens SP (5/1 drift in, 3.5× price compression)
favourite_failures.note: Our largest stake (£2.70). Evens favourite — last of 6. Slow into stride. Trainer no explanation. The model rated this HIGH with 64.9% edge at 6/1; at Evens the edge evaporated entirely.

16/1 morning → 15/8 favourite at SP. Something caused massive market confidence that did not materialise on the track. Flagged for Rusty signal calibration: the market_move signal should have caught this drift — did it? The model had 40.5% edge at 16/1; at 15/8 the implied prob was ~53%.

missed_winner.our_decision: PASS (MED confidence, 13.0% edge, below 15% WIN gate threshold)
missed_winner.pl_missed: A £0.34 WIN bet at 7/1 SP would have returned ~£2.72 (£2.38 profit) — illustrative only
missed_winner.note: The Badger gate correctly required ≥15% edge for WIN bets. Mister Winston had 13.0% — just below gate. At SP 7/1, the model had positive EV but below threshold. Whether the gate was right to exclude depends on long-run calibration. Danny's calibration review item.

stale_data_gate_pass.gate_verdict: PASS — all 3 live-runner gate catches confirmed by official result. 16:40 ran 18 runners, 17:50 ran 16 runners, both matching expected post-removal counts.
